title: centaurea oxylepis
intro: Centaurea oxylepis, also known as the Rough Chervil or Rough Knapped Chervil, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea oxylepis include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Centaurea oxylepis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing it to be easily incorporated into a variety of herbal remedies.
